identity.name: Afghan Home Network
identity.platform_notes: Standard WP Engine hosting. Custom domain not yet mapped. Dashboard at /dashboard/ is a standalone PHP app (not a WP plugin).

voice_capture.bilingual_convention: Files use __{lang} suffix (en, prs, ps). Each topic can have captures and drafts in multiple languages.
voice_capture.draft_format_note: Generated drafts contain <h1> in body HTML. Hub pipeline must strip per article spec (H1 lives in ATF hero, not in main-content).

primary_sme.name: Sohail A. Safi
primary_sme.notes: Named author/SME. Voice capture subject. All content drafted from his answers.

frozen_subsystems.name: voice_capture_dashboard
frozen_subsystems.notes: Standalone PHP app. Safi actively using for voice capture. Claims policy embedded in GUARDRAILS constant (index.php lines 42-61). TODO: refactor to read from docs/ahn-claims-policy.md.

known_traps.name: Dashboard auth
known_traps.description: Token-based auth (no WP sessions). Operator and author roles. Passwords in index.php constants.

known_traps.name: No WP publish path
known_traps.description: Dashboard stores drafts as flat JSON files. No wp_insert_post or wp_update_post. 'Published' is a JSON status label, not a WP post_status.

known_traps.name: kb.json enrichment
known_traps.description: Capture submissions automatically append examples to kb.json. Any test capture must restore kb.json afterward.

integrations.cdn_notes: WP Engine Varnish. Dashboard served directly from webroot, not through WP — standard WPE cache applies.
